response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified video content as an introductory segment followed by a live performance.
2. Performed OCR on on-screen text to identify the song '革命道中' and performer 'Tsunomaki Watame'.
3. Verified the performer and song title.
4. Transcribed lyrics directly from the video overlay for the performance segment.
response.global_summary: An introductory greeting, a countdown, and a musical performance of the song 'Kakumei Douchuu' by Tsunomaki Watame. The video prominently displays the performer and song credits.

scenes.description: An intro and countdown screen with instrumental background music. No vocals are present.
Tsunomaki Watame performs the song 'Kakumei Douchuu'. Lyrics are shown on screen during the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
暗闇　血泥　突いたて守りたい
革命道中だって君に夢中
暗闇に染み込む世界で見つけた
センチメンタルな恋

甘くのたうんだ眼差し
変に色気あるから困った
手を繋ぐ勇気出したくて
身の程　わきまえてちゃできないね
暗いトンネルの壁　滴り落ちる秘密
しなやかに
